arts.ttl: Prediksi Esperance de Tunis Vs Chelsea di Piala Dunia Antarklub 2025: Laga Krusial Bagi The Blues
arts.sum: Chelsea akan bentrok dengan Esperance de Tunis pada laga terakhir Grup D Piala Dunia Antarklub 2025 di Lincoln Financial Field, Philadelphia.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca to rest players for Chelsea vs Esperance de Tunis at Club World Cup
arts.sum: The Blues need only avoid defeat against the Tunisian side in Philadelphia to be assured of a place in the last 16.
